channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections 2026 Records Historic Voter Turnout Exceeding 85%
item.description: Polling for the 17th Tamil Nadu Assembly took place on April 23, 2026, from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m., witnessing a historic voter turnout exceeding 85% for the first time since Independence. The State's elect...

item.title: ANC Threatens SACP Over Election Allegiances Amid Growing Tensions
item.description: The South African Communist Party (SACP) is resisting a demand from its alliance partner, the African National Congress (ANC), ahead of the 2026 local elections. ANC Secretary-General Fikile Mbalula h...

item.title: David Malouf: A Life in Literature and Poetry
item.description: David George Joseph Malouf AO, one of Australia's most celebrated and internationally recognised writers, passed away at 92. Born in Brisbane in 1934 to a Lebanese-Melkite Christian father and a Europ...

item.title: Key Headlines in the Philippines and Around the World on April 23, 2026
item.description: Today’s top news highlights several major events in the Philippines and internationally. Former Philippine president Rodrigo Duterte is confirmed to face trial at the International Criminal Court, wit...

item.title: Olivia Dean captivates Glasgow with her debut arena performance
item.description: Olivia Dean delivered a memorable performance at the OVO Hydro in Glasgow, marking the opening of her first arena tour. Dressed in a striking candyfloss-pink gown, she exuded both charm and confidence...

item.title: US Loosens Restrictions on Marijuana Products, Reclassifies Them as Less Dangerous
item.description: The US Department of Justice has announced a significant change in its approach to marijuana regulation, reclassifying certain marijuana products as less dangerous. This move follows the Trump adminis...

item.title: Prosecutors allege evidence of child exploitation in case against singer D4vd over killing of 14-year-old
item.description: Los Angeles prosecutors revealed new allegations in the criminal case against singer David Anthony Burke, known as D4vd, who is charged with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. During a...

item.title: A Love Letter to Earth: Celebrating Beauty and Hope on Earth Day
item.description: On Earth Day 2026, the article reflects on the profound beauty of our planet, while acknowledging the challenges it faces. The author discusses the emotional impact of seeing Earth from space, where i...

item.title: Dir. Azuelo Reinstates Marcus Amid Ongoing Conflict in Episode 14 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: Sa Episode 14 ng “Blood vs Duty,” isang mahalagang desisyon ang ginawa ni Director Azuelo na muling ibalik si Marcus sa kanyang trabaho, sa kabila ng mga naunang isyu at tensyon na kinasasangkutan nit...

item.title: Labor focuses on intergenerational equity amid budget pressures and policy reforms
item.description: The article argues that baby boomers are losing political favour in Australia as the Albanese government sharpens its focus on intergenerational equity. Growing frustration among younger Australians—p...

item.title: India Implements Hub-and-Spoke Model to Improve Domestic and International Air Connectivity
item.description: India is moving ahead with its hub-and-spoke aviation policy to improve connectivity between smaller cities and international destinations via major hub airports such as Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyde...

item.title: Fact-Check: Kenyan President's Claims on Fuel Prices and Road Network
item.description: On 19 April 2026, President William Ruto defended high fuel prices in Kenya during a church meeting in Nairobi, linking the rise to global conflicts and infrastructure costs. He argued Kenya should be...

item.title: Understanding Kenya's Youth Voter Turnout Challenges
item.description: In Kenya, young people form a significant portion of the population and dominate online discussions, yet they often skip voting during elections. The 2022 general election saw a national turnout of 64...

item.title: Trump orders expanded naval action and mine countermeasures in Strait of Hormuz amid tensions with Iran
item.description: Donald Trump has reportedly instructed the United States Navy to take aggressive action against any vessels suspected of deploying naval mines in the Strait of Hormuz, ordering forces to “shoot and ki...

item.title: Light rain expected in Los Angeles this weekend with minor accumulation
item.description: The National Weather Service is forecasting additional light rainfall for the Los Angeles area beginning Saturday morning and continuing through the evening and overnight hours. According to meteorolo...

item.title: Miami Grand Prix practice extended due to recent changes and race cancellations
item.description: Formula One drivers will benefit from an additional 30 minutes of practice ahead of the Miami Grand Prix, taking place on May 3. This comes after the cancellation of races in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia ...

item.title: Global study shows women underrepresented in scientific leadership despite workforce presence
item.description: This 2026 global study highlight that although women now make up nearly a third of the global research workforce, they remain largely underrepresented in leadership positions within scientific academi...

item.title: Pakistan and 7 Muslim Nations Stand Firm on Preserving Jerusalem’s Historic Status
item.description: On Thursday, the foreign ministers of Pakistan along with seven other Muslim-majority countries issued a united statement strongly rejecting any efforts to alter the historic and legal status quo of J...

item.title: Analysts say Iran can absorb short-term impact of US naval blockade despite oil pressure
item.description: Iran’s economy is expected to face pressure from a US naval blockade on its ports, but analysts believe it is unlikely to collapse in the short term. The blockade comes amid escalating tensions in the...

item.title: Trump administration considers expanding research and access to ibogaine
item.description: Ibogaine is a naturally occurring psychedelic compound derived from the African iboga plant that has drawn attention for its possible role in treating addiction, trauma, and certain mental health cond...
